title: Duel at Dawn
scaleGoal: Scale encounter complexity and skill expression while preserving clear cause/effect and fair challenge.
notes: Approved archetype strategy for Duel at Dawn.
Update this strategy when core loop, progression model, or scoring rules change.
Before promotion, run strict review for game19_duel_at_dawn and relevant game tests.
Add a workspace tests/run.mjs suite before next production promotion.
gameSpecificTargets: Deepen reaction/counter windows with readable telegraphs.
Introduce duel styles and tactical stance variations.
Tune fairness across latency and frame pacing boundaries.

approvedPlan.summary: Approved action development strategy for Duel at Dawn.

stages.name: Core Gameplay Systems
stages.objective: Split combat and progression systems into independent modules with parity coverage.
deliverables: Modularized runtime subsystems for the core loop.
Behavior parity verification against current production baseline.
Targeted unit/regression tests for extracted systems.
exitCriteria: Core loop parity confirmed in seeded/manual runs.
All Stage 1 tests passing in CI/local runner.

stages.name: Content and Presentation Expansion
stages.objective: Add combat styles, enemy counters, and reward loops tied to mastery.
deliverables: New mechanics/content variants aligned to archetype.
Improved readability and UX feedback for new systems.
Balance pass for rewards, upgrades, and challenge pacing.
exitCriteria: Content additions validated against difficulty targets.
No readability regressions under peak gameplay load.

stages.name: Optimization and Quality Hardening
stages.objective: Tune difficulty curves and automate combat regression validation.
deliverables: Performance optimization of hot loops and allocations.
Expanded automated regression and stress suites.
Release candidate checklist with rollback safety.
exitCriteria: Performance budgets met for target hardware/browser matrix.
Regression suite stable across repeated runs.

manualChecks: Launch -> playthrough -> game over -> restart cycle
State cleanup after disconnect/reconnect and rerun

successMetrics: Consistent TTK envelope across target skill bands
No invalid combat states during stress tests
No restart desync after repeated failures
